summary: Wired orphaned crosspost_blog_content() pipeline into autonomous execution. 3 posts cross-posted live, 22 remaining staged for future cron cycles.

channel_spidering_guard.py.rationale: Prevents rapid-fire cross-posting; 6h matches 3x/day cron schedule

changes: Added guard_check('telegraph') at top of main() - rejects runs within 6h cooldown
Added guard_record('telegraph', ok=...) after posting - records success/failure state

crontab.rationale: Each run cross-posts 3 blog posts to Telegraph; 25 posts total will drain in ~9 cycles (~3 days)

live_cross_posted.title: AI Agent Orchestration CLI: A Composable Alternative to Monolithic Agent Frameworks
AI Agent Output Verification: How to Review Unattended Coding Results Without Reading Every Line
AI Coding Tools Compared 2026: A Practical Guide to What Each One Actually Does

hold_window_rule_context: concrete runtime/process repair with code + process changes (not a prompt/rerun tweak). Both active_loop_prompt_repair and post_hold_reentry_contract_repair already exist.
